title: Python Fundamentals
description: Core Python syntax, data types, control flow, functions, and file I/O.

title: Data Structures & Algorithms
description: Arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs, sorting, searching, and complexity analysis.

title: Linear Algebra
description: Vectors, matrices, eigenvalues, singular value decomposition, and linear transformations.

title: Probability & Statistics
description: Probability distributions, Bayes theorem, hypothesis testing, and statistical inference.

title: NumPy & Pandas
description: Numerical computing with NumPy arrays and data manipulation with Pandas DataFrames.

title: Machine Learning Basics
description: Supervised vs unsupervised learning, bias-variance tradeoff, cross-validation, and evaluation metrics.

title: Deep Learning Fundamentals
description: Neural network architecture, backpropagation, activation functions, and optimization.

title: Natural Language Processing
description: Tokenization, embeddings, sequence models, attention mechanism, and transformers.

title: PyTorch Framework
description: Tensors, autograd, nn.Module, DataLoader, training loops, and model serialization.

title: Model Deployment & MLOps
description: Model serving with FastAPI, containerization, CI/CD for ML, and monitoring in production.
